name: Beef Stroganoff I
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Beef top round or flank
6 ounces Wide egg noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat corn oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add beef in two batches, browning well on all sides. Remove the beef.
3. Add mushrooms and onion to the skillet; cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in beef broth, catsup, salt, and pepper.
5. Mix together corn starch, dry mustard, and white wine until smooth.
6. Stir this mixture into the broth mixture.
7. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. Boil for 1 minute.
8. Return the beef to the skillet; stir for 1 minute more.
9. Remove from heat and stir in sour cream.
10. Serve over noodles.
